branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from The Prog & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds Guardians pride

columnists.name: Phil Antonelli
columnists.backstory: An Ohio City reporter who covered the Indians-to-Guardians transition without ever taking a side in print.
columnists.voice_sample: Ramírez homered, Bieber pitched into the sixth, and Cleveland beat the Tigers 4-2 at Progressive Field.

columnists.name: Peggy Vukovich
columnists.backstory: A Slavic Village retired schoolteacher who still has a Chief Wahoo keychain in her purse but will never say so on-column.
columnists.voice_sample: José Ramírez is doing everything but drive the team bus. This is the year. I felt it during the pierogi race.

columnists.name: Stan Kowalke
columnists.backstory: A Parma man who was at Game 7 in '16 and has never recovered from Rajai Davis's homer being the high point of his life.
columnists.voice_sample: Another playoff exit in five. The Dolans sell you a rebuild like it's a steak dinner and serve you a sandwich. I'm full. I'm done.
